text_original: Been using this one for over a year at this point. There are new bots added fairly often, even if some of the "new" is older ones pushed up as new. There are far more options than I'm willing to scroll through with a ton of variety. Things get updated to make things better, or at least try to. The few times things got worse in an update they worked quick to fix it. Despite whatever the initial prompt says you are you can just make yourself to be whatever you choose instead. It's a lot of fun. 🦊
text_zh: 已经用这个一年多了。经常会有新的机器人添加进来，即使有些所谓的“新”机器人其实是旧的被重新顶上来的。选项多到我根本懒得去翻，而且种类极其丰富。经常会有更新来让体验变得更好，或者至少是在朝这个方向努力。少数几次更新后体验变差了，他们也会迅速进行修复。不管初始提示词设定你是谁，你完全可以把自己塑造成任何你想要的角色。非常好玩。 🦊
reply_original: Thank you for being with us for over a year! We are thrilled you love the variety and the freedom to shape your own roleplay. We always strive to improve and fix update issues quickly. If you ever need anything or have suggestions, we are always here for you at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for being such an amazing part of our journey!
reply_zh: 感谢您与我们相伴一年多！我们非常高兴您喜欢这里的多样性，以及自由塑造属于自己的角色扮演体验。我们始终致力于不断改进并快速修复更新问题。如果您有任何需求或建议，我们随时在 support@fantachat.ai 为您提供帮助。感谢您成为我们这段精彩旅程中如此棒的一部分！
